summary: Matched two previously stubbed itsonans item functions and added the minimal Sonans attributes/item-vars layout needed to express them. The decomp.dev report credited 2 new matches in main/melee/it/items/itsonans: it_802CD44C (+140 bytes) and itSonans_UnkMotion0_Anim (+112 bytes), raising matched code by +252 bytes and improving .sdata2 matching.

key_files.role: Replaced two nonmatching marker comments with C implementations for it_802CD44C and itSonans_UnkMotion0_Anim.
Added itsonansAttributes and extended itSonans_ItemVars with x64 and x68 fields used by the matched functions.

what_changed: Added typedef struct itsonansAttributes with fields x0, x4, x8, xC, x10, x14, x18, x1C, x20, and x24; comments identify x8 as hit sensitivity and x24 as the lifetime setting.
Extended itSonans_ItemVars from only x60 to include x64 and x68 at item-var offsets ip+E38 and ip+E3C.

Implemented it_802CD44C as Sonans item initialization: retrieves Item via GET_ITEM, reads special attributes from item->xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes, zeroes facing_dir, xDAC_itcmd_var0, and sonans item vars x60/x64/x68, sets xD44_lifeTimer from attrs->x24, then calls it_80279CDC(gobj, attrs->x0), it_80275444(gobj), and it_802CDAA8(gobj).

Implemented itSonans_UnkMotion0_Anim: checks it_80272C6C(gobj), and when it returns 0 calls it_802CD9C0(gobj) and Item_8026AE84(item, 0x272B, 0x7F, 0x40); always decrements item->xD44_lifeTimer by 1.0f and returns false.
decomp.dev reported GALE01 matched code at 50.51%, +0.01%, +252 bytes, with both touched functions moving from 0.00% to 100.00%.
smart_moves: The PR first exposed the required special-attribute and item-var fields in itCommonItems.h, allowing the C code to use normal typed accesses rather than raw offsets.

The initializer uses article_data special attributes for both lifetime and parameter setup, which matches the observed item data flow and avoids hardcoding values except for the animation/event constants in Item_8026AE84.

The animation function keeps the control flow simple: transition/effect call only when it_80272C6C returns 0, then a lifetime decrement and unconditional false return, matching a small item animation callback pattern.
decomp_lessons: For common item actors, matching may require adding just enough item-specific attribute and item-var struct layout before replacing stubs.
Preserve unknown field names such as x0, x24, x60, x64, and x68 when semantics are only partially known; add short comments only where evidence is available.
Initialization functions often reset per-item vars, copy lifetime from special attributes into xD44_lifeTimer, and then call shared item setup helpers in a specific order.
Animation callbacks can match with direct float decrement syntax, e.g. item->xD44_lifeTimer -= 1.0f, rather than integer-style decrement.
naming_conventions: Existing unknown symbol names were retained: it_802CD44C, it_802CD4D8, it_802CD7D4, it_802CD9C0, and itSonans_UnkMotion0_Anim.
The new attribute typedef was named itsonansAttributes, matching the lowercase item prefix style used in this slice rather than introducing a more polished semantic name.
Item vars continue to live under item->xDD4_itemVar.sonans and use placeholder x-offset field names until meanings are confirmed.
The function-local special attributes pointer was named attrs.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replace `/// #symbol` markers with exact C only after the dependent struct fields are declared.
Use GET_ITEM(gobj) for the Item pointer in item callbacks.
Access item special attributes through item->xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes and cast to the item-specific attribute struct.
Use explicit floating constants 0.0f and 1.0f for float stores/decrements to preserve matching behavior.
Keep helper-call ordering in the initializer as it_80279CDC, it_80275444, then it_802CDAA8.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The only recorded feedback was the decomp.dev bot report confirming two new 100% function matches and a .sdata2 improvement.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that rename or refine itsonansAttributes fields x0, x8, or x24.
Find follow-up work on unmatched itsonans functions it_802CD7D4 and related motion callbacks.
Search for other item initializer functions using xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes plus xD44_lifeTimer setup for reusable matching patterns.
